top_signals.title: How Apple stock rode the AI rollercoaster to record highs in 1 chart
top_signals.summary: Apple stayed true to itself in the AI race, and Wall Street is finally rewarding the stock for it.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix rises 13% in Nasdaq debut. Chairman tells CNBC 'demand is enormous'
